prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Once upon a time, deep in the blue ocean, there lived a shimmery purple octopus named Olly. Olly had eight long arms covered in tiny suckers, and a round head with big round eyes. He loved watching the colorful fish and swimming rays from his cozy little cave. But Olly was very shy and nervous about going out to explore or talk to the other sea creatures. He wished he had some friends to play with, but was too timid. Little did Olly know, an exciting adventure awaited him that would change his life forever!
